zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Reynes II於1470年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯時，他的父親John Reynes30歲，母親Broughton32歲。他於大約1488年與Maud Boothe在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1535年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Reynes II于1470年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯时，他的父亲John Reynes30岁，母亲Broughton32岁。他于大约1488年与Maud Boothe在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1535年在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reynes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Raines
meanings: English: variant of Raine , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Rayne (Essex), recorded in the Domesday Book as Raines in the 11th century. The etymology of the placename is uncertain, but it may derive from Old English hrægene ‘hut, shelter’ or from a pre-English river name for Pods Brook (a river on which Rayne lies), cognate with the German river name Regen (a tributary of the Danube), formed from the Indo-European root reg- ‘wet, moisten, water’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Rennes in Brittany, France.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Reynes II was born in 1470, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Reynes, was 30 and his mother, Broughton, was 32. He married Maud Boothe about 1488, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1535, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

Il a épousé Maud Boothe environ 1488, à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1535, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Reynes II è nato il nel 1470 nel Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Reynes, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Broughton, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Maud Boothe circa 1488, nel Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1535, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Reynes IIが1470年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスで生まれた時，父John Reynesは30歳，母Broughtonは32歳であった。約1488年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスでMaud Bootheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1535年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Reynes II(이)가 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Reynes(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Broughton(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 Maud Boothe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1535년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Reynes II родился в 1470 г. в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Reynes было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Broughton, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Boothe около 1488 г. в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1535 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.
